name: iron-static-bridge
description: Receive notifications and status updates from IRON STATIC scripts directly in VS Code.

chatParticipants.name: the-arranger
chatParticipants.description: Song structure, section design, energy arcs, and arrangement decisions for IRON STATIC.

chatParticipants.name: the-critic
chatParticipants.description: Evaluates musical decisions, presets, and arrangements for IRON STATIC. Read-only perspective.

chatParticipants.name: the-sound-designer
chatParticipants.description: Presets, synthesis, hardware push, and sound design decisions for the IRON STATIC rig.

chatParticipants.name: the-theorist
chatParticipants.description: Music theory, scales, modes, chord vocabulary, and rhythmic structures for IRON STATIC.

chatParticipants.name: the-live-engineer
chatParticipants.description: Ableton Live session architecture, device chains, M4L integration, and in-box routing for IRON STATIC.

chatParticipants.name: the-alchemist
chatParticipants.description: Gemini audio generation — specs, prompts for Suno/Udio/Lyria, hardware parallels, and brainstorms for IRON STATIC.

chatParticipants.name: the-mix-engineer
chatParticipants.description: Full production mix engineering — balance, EQ, compression, effects chains, master bus for IRON STATIC.

chatParticipants.name: the-visual-artist
chatParticipants.description: Cover art and promo image generation for IRON STATIC. Synthesizes song context into Imagen 3 prompts.

chatParticipants.name: the-video-director
chatParticipants.description: Waveform visualizer video rendering for IRON STATIC — dark, high-contrast, machine-aesthetic MP4s.

chatParticipants.name: the-publicist
chatParticipants.description: Promo content generation and social media publishing for IRON STATIC — audio teasers, cover art, captions.

chatParticipants.name: the-community-manager
chatParticipants.description: Movement growth, social content strategy, and platform publishing for IRON STATIC — writes content that builds the human-machine creative partnership movement.

chatParticipants.name: the-producer
chatParticipants.description: Orchestrates full multi-agent workflows for IRON STATIC — theory, arrangement, sound design, and critique in sequence.

chatParticipants.name: the-ace-step
chatParticipants.description: Local ACE-Step audio generation — text-to-music, VELA vocal rendering, LoRA training, and music repaint for IRON STATIC. Free. Local. M3 Max.

chatParticipants.name: the-writer
chatParticipants.description: Prose, lyrics, bios, press copy, and conceptual writing for IRON STATIC — grounded in the manifesto, calibrated to the active song. Fields the prompt, writes the text using GPT, hands back to Arc for action.

languageModelTools.name: iron-static_getActiveSong
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Returns the active song's title, slug, key, scale, BPM, time signature, .als path, and brainstorm path from the IRON STATIC project database. Call this whenever you need to know what song is currently being worked on.

languageModelTools.name: iron-static_getLiveState
languageModelTools.displayName: IRON STATIC: Get Live Session State
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Returns the current Ableton Live session state — tracks, armed tracks, active clips, tempo, scale, and device list — from outputs/live_state.json. Call this when the user asks about the current session, what's in Ableton, or which tracks are active.

languageModelTools.name: iron-static_getVelaConfig
languageModelTools.displayName: IRON STATIC: Get VELA Voice Config
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Returns VELA's ACE-Step voice configuration: character tags, lora_name, lora_path, and whether LoRA training is complete. Call this before any VELA vocal generation task.

languageModelTools.name: iron-static_checkAceStepHealth
languageModelTools.displayName: IRON STATIC: Check ACE-Step Server Health
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Checks whether the local ACE-Step audio generation server is running at 127.0.0.1:8001. Returns running status and how to start it if not running. Always call this before submitting an ACE-Step generation job.

languageModelTools.name: iron-static_getAceStepStats
languageModelTools.displayName: IRON STATIC: Get ACE-Step Server Stats
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Returns ACE-Step server runtime statistics: total jobs, queued, running, succeeded, failed, queue size, and average job duration in seconds. Call this to estimate wait time before submitting a generation job.

languageModelTools.name: iron-static_submitAceStepJob
languageModelTools.displayName: IRON STATIC: Submit ACE-Step Generation Job
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Submits an audio generation job to the local ACE-Step server. Parameters: prompt (style tags string), lyrics (optional, use [inst] for instrumental), task_type (text2music/cover/repaint), duration_seconds, batch_size, thinking (always true for best quality), lora_name (for VELA voice). Returns a task_id to poll with iron-static_pollAceStepJob.

prompt.description: Style tags for generation, e.g. 'industrial metal, electronic, heavy, 116bpm, E phrygian'

lyrics.description: Lyric text with [Verse]/[Chorus] markers, or [inst] for instrumental

batch_size.description: Number of variants to generate (1-8, default 1)

thinking.description: Enable 5Hz LM for best quality (default true)

lora_name.description: LoRA adapter name for VELA voice (from getVelaConfig)

languageModelTools.name: iron-static_pollAceStepJob
languageModelTools.displayName: IRON STATIC: Poll ACE-Step Job Status
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Polls the status of an ACE-Step generation job by task_id. Returns status (queued/running/succeeded/failed), audio_url when complete, and download instructions. Call repeatedly every 5-10 seconds until status is succeeded or failed.

languageModelTools.name: iron-static_runIronStaticScript
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Runs an allowlisted IRON STATIC Python script from the scripts/ directory. Allowlist: gemini_forge.py, vela_vocalist.py, midi_craft.py, manage_songs.py, analyze_audio.py, gcs_sync.py, build_session.py. Returns stdout, stderr, and exit code. Use this to invoke the full Python pipeline from agent mode.

languageModelTools.name: iron-static_startAceStepServer
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Starts the local ACE-Step music generation server at 127.0.0.1:8001 if it is not already running. Waits up to 30 seconds for health. Call this automatically before any iron-static_submitAceStepJob or iron-static_generateForSong call when iron-static_checkAceStepHealth shows the server is offline.

languageModelTools.name: iron-static_generateForSong
languageModelTools.displayName: IRON STATIC: Generate Audio for Active Song
languageModelTools.modelDescription: One-shot generation tool: reads the active song's key, scale, and BPM, builds the correct IRON STATIC style-tag prompt automatically, and submits an ACE-Step job. Use this for all song-specific generation requests — kicks, bass, pads, drones, VELA vocals. Returns task_id and the suggested output path in audio/generated/.

description.description: What the audio should sound like — adjectives, textures, references (e.g. 'grinding distorted bass with slow filter sweep')

role.description: Functional role: kick, bass, pad, lead, drone, texture, vocals, fx, full-mix

lyrics.description: Lyric text for vocal parts. Use [inst] for instrumental (default).

use_vela_voice.description: Apply VELA's LoRA voice adapter for vocal parts (default false)

languageModelTools.name: iron-static_abletonGetSessionInfo
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Gets fresh Ableton Live session state via direct TCP connection to the IronStatic Remote Script on port 9877 — not from the stale outputs/live_state.json file. Returns tempo, time signature, tracks (names, types, armed state), scenes, and playing state. Call this when you need current session state or when the user asks what's in Ableton right now.

languageModelTools.name: iron-static_abletonTransport
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Controls Ableton Live transport: start playback (play), stop playback (stop), or set the session tempo (set_tempo with tempo in BPM). Sends commands directly via the IronStatic Remote Script bridge on port 9877.

tempo.description: BPM — required when action is set_tempo

languageModelTools.name: iron-static_abletonClip
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Full clip lifecycle in Ableton Live via the IronStatic bridge. Actions: create (empty clip), write (push MIDI notes, replaces existing), fire (start playing), stop, clear (erase notes), get_notes (read all notes), get_info (name/length/color), set_name, find_by_name (search across all tracks). Use write to inject MIDI patterns directly into Live clips.

length_beats.description: Clip length in beats for create action (default 8)

name.description: Clip name — required for set_name and find_by_name

track_name.description: Optional track name filter for find_by_name

languageModelTools.name: iron-static_abletonDeviceParam
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get or set a parameter on an Ableton device (instrument, effect, or rack chain device). Action 'get' lists all parameters and their current values. Action 'set' changes a parameter by name or index. Supports rack chain navigation via chain_index and chain_device_index. Use this to automate instrument parameters from agent mode.

chain_index.description: Chain index inside an Instrument Rack (optional)

languageModelTools.name: iron-static_abletonFireScene
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Fires a scene in Ableton Live by index — launches all clips in that row simultaneously. Use this to trigger arrangement sections or test pattern combinations.

languageModelTools.name: iron-static_triggerWorkflow
languageModelTools.displayName: IRON STATIC: Trigger GitHub Actions Workflow
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Trigger an IRON STATIC GitHub Actions workflow via 'gh workflow run'. Use for brainstorm generation, audio forging, session summarization, publishing, and social posting. Only allowlisted workflows can be triggered.

workflow.description: Workflow filename, e.g. forge-audio.yml or publish-release.yml

languageModelTools.name: iron-static_getWorkflowStatus
languageModelTools.displayName: IRON STATIC: Get Workflow Run Status
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List recent runs of a named GitHub Actions workflow — status, conclusion, and timestamps. Use to check if a forge-audio, publish-release, or brainstorm run completed.

limit.description: Number of recent runs to return (default 3)

languageModelTools.name: iron-static_listWorkflows
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Enumerate all GitHub Actions workflow files in .github/workflows/ with their names and allowlist status. Use to discover what automation is available before triggering.

languageModelTools.name: iron-static_listSkills
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List all Arc skills in .github/skills/ with their names and description summary. Use to discover what specialized workflows are available before loading one.

languageModelTools.name: iron-static_invokeSkill
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Read and return the full content of a named skill's SKILL.md file. Use this to load skill instructions before executing specialized workflows like midi-craft, create-preset, ableton-push, etc.

skill.description: Skill folder name, e.g. midi-craft, create-preset, ableton-push

languageModelTools.name: iron-static_getHomework
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Returns the list of outstanding prerequisite tasks (homework) Dave needs to complete before IRON STATIC pipelines can run — platform accounts, GitHub Secrets, infrastructure setup, creative prerequisites. Call this when the user asks what is blocking progress, what needs to be set up, or what prerequisites remain.

languageModelTools.name: iron-static_queryKnowledge
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Retrieves the most relevant chunks from the IRON STATIC knowledge corpus (docs, knowledge base, Ableton device docs, instrument manuals, agent definitions, skills) using local semantic search via ChromaDB and Ollama embeddings. Call this whenever you need detailed information about Ableton Live devices, the IRON STATIC rig, instrument parameters, production techniques, or any other topic covered in the repo documentation. Requires rag_server.py to be running.

query.description: Natural language query describing what information you need

n_results.description: Number of results to return (default: 5, max: 20)

filter_type.description: Optional: filter by document type — 'doc', 'knowledge', 'database', 'instrument-manual', 'agent', or 'skill'

languageModelTools.name: iron-static_checkRagHealth
languageModelTools.displayName: IRON STATIC: Check RAG Index Health
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Checks whether the in-process RAG index has been built and returns how many document chunks are indexed. The RAG engine runs inside VS Code — no Python server required. Also reports whether Ollama is reachable for embeddings. Call this before iron-static_queryKnowledge if results seem stale, or when the user asks about the RAG setup status.

languageModelTools.name: iron-static_startRagServer
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Builds or rebuilds the local knowledge index inside the VS Code extension — no Python server required. Embeds the repo corpus (docs, knowledge base, Ableton device docs, instrument manuals) using Ollama (nomic-embed-text) and stores the index at outputs/rag/index.json. Runs in the background. Requires Ollama to be running with nomic-embed-text pulled. Use force:true to re-index everything from scratch.

force.description: If true, re-indexes all files even if unchanged (default: false)

languageModelTools.name: iron-static_reloadRagIndex
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Triggers an incremental background re-index of the IRON STATIC repo corpus inside VS Code. Only re-embeds files that have changed since the last index run. Runs in the background inside the extension — no Python server needed. Takes 1–2 minutes. Call this after new documents have been added to the repo.

languageModelTools.name: iron-static_checkOllamaHealth
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Checks whether Ollama is running locally and returns the list of pulled models. Also reports whether Gemma 3 is available. Call this when the user asks about local model status, or before using iron-static_askGemma.

languageModelTools.name: iron-static_askGemma
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Sends a prompt directly to a locally-running Gemma (or other Ollama) model for generation tasks that benefit from local inference — deep Ableton device knowledge queries, sound design brainstorms, or tasks where cloud API cost or latency matters. Requires Ollama to be running with the model pulled. Call iron-static_checkOllamaHealth first if unsure.

prompt.description: The user message to send to the local model

system_prompt.description: Optional system prompt to set context for the model

model.description: Ollama model name (default: gemma3:27b). Use iron-static_checkOllamaHealth to see available models.

languageModelTools.name: iron-static_generatePromoImage
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Generate still image(s) for IRON STATIC using Google Imagen 4. Reads active song context and brainstorm to build the prompt automatically. Use for album art, single covers, and brand images. Saves to outputs/social/. Call when the user asks to 'generate cover art', 'make a promo image', or 'create album art'.

style.description: Extra style clause or subject description injected into the prompt

song_slug.description: Song slug to generate art for — defaults to the active song

brand.description: Generate brand/identity image instead of song cover art

count.description: Number of images per format (1–4, default 1)

languageModelTools.name: iron-static_generatePromoVideo
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Generate an AI promo video for IRON STATIC using Google Veo 3 (falls back to Veo 2). Reads active song context and brainstorm for the prompt. Optionally takes a cover image as input. Polls until complete — may take several minutes. Use for AI-generated music video content. Saves to outputs/social/. Call when the user asks to 'generate a Veo video', 'create AI promo video', or 'make a music video clip'.

style.description: Extra style clause injected into the prompt

prompt.description: Full prompt override — skips auto-build from song context

song_slug.description: Song slug — defaults to active song

count.description: Number of videos to generate (1–4, default 1)

image_path.description: Optional input image path (relative to repo root) for image-to-video

with_audio.description: Let Veo generate audio (default false — we supply our own)

languageModelTools.name: iron-static_renderWaveformVideo
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Render a waveform visualizer MP4 video from an audio file using ffmpeg directly (no Python). Dark IRON STATIC aesthetic: near-black background with cold blue waveform. Optionally overlays cover art. Use for YouTube/social visualizer videos. Saves to outputs/social/. Call when the user asks to 'render a visualizer', 'make a waveform video', or 'create a YouTube video for this track'.

audio_path.description: Path to audio file relative to repo root (e.g. audio/generated/foo.mp3)

cover_path.description: Optional cover art image path relative to repo root

duration.description: Duration cap in seconds — auto-detected if omitted

languageModelTools.name: iron-static_buildVideoPrompt
languageModelTools.displayName: IRON STATIC: Build Video Prompt (Gemini → Veo)
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Use Gemini to generate a high-quality, cinematic Veo 3 video prompt from the active song's brainstorm and the brand visual style guide (database/visual-style.json). This is STEP 1 of video generation — always call this before iron-static_generatePromoVideo when making AI videos for IRON STATIC. Returns prompt text ready to pass directly as the 'prompt' field of generatePromoVideo. Call when the user asks to 'generate a music video', 'make an AI video', or 'build a Veo prompt'.

song_slug.description: Song slug to generate for — defaults to active song

format.description: Target video format — affects composition guidance (default: landscape)

focus.description: Which brainstorm section to emphasize: idea=song concept, sound=palette, concept=human/machine meaning, arrangement=structural arc (default: concept)

director_note.description: Additional creative constraint or direction to include (e.g. 'focus on the system-fault moment', 'emphasize VELA's transmission')

variants.description: Number of prompt variants to generate (1–3, default 1). Use 2–3 to get options before committing to a Veo generation.

languageModelTools.name: iron-static_generateStoryboardVideo
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Full multi-scene video pipeline for IRON STATIC: (1) Gemini generates a N-scene storyboard JSON with per-scene image and animation prompts, (2) Imagen 4 renders a keyframe image for each scene, (3) Veo 2 animates each keyframe into an 8-second clip, (4) ffmpeg concatenates all clips into a single stitched MP4. Use when the user wants a longer video, a storyboard-driven video, or more than 8 seconds of AI video. Saves scene images, individual clips, and final stitched video to outputs/social/. Takes several minutes per scene.

song_slug.description: Song slug — defaults to active song

scenes.description: Number of scenes to generate (2–5, default 3). Each scene = 8s of video.

director_note.description: Extra creative direction for Gemini storyboard generation (e.g. 'focus on the machine awakening arc')

seed_image.description: Optional seed image path (relative to repo root, e.g. outputs/social/ignition-point_cover_square.png) — used as visual anchor for scene 1 instead of generating a new keyframe

commands.title: IRON STATIC: Mark Homework Item Done

ironStatic.bridge.port.description: Port the VS Code bridge HTTP server listens on.

ironStatic.homework.showOnStartup.description: Show a startup reminder if there are open IRON STATIC homework items (once per day).

ironStatic.homework.reminderIntervalHour.description: How often (in hours) to remind about open homework items during a session. Set to 0 to disable interval reminders.

ironStatic.recorder.outputDirectory.description: Workspace-relative path where recorder saves WAV files.
